calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2017 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2017 Off Calendar

Defendants Debra Schoenberg And Schoenberg Family Law Group, P.C.'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-21-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Paul A. Frassetto of the law offices of Paul A. Frassetto (415.354.2700) appears as counsel for plaintiff

No other appearance is made in this matter

Previously argued and and taken under submission on February 16, 2017, Defendants Debra Schoenberg And Schoenberg Family Law Group, P.C.'S Motion For Summary Judgment is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Summary adjudication is granted as to Berkeley and Santa Rosa Properties and denied as to MediaTrope. The Court reads into the record a statement of findings and reasons as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reported. Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Paul A. Frassetto of the law offices of Paul A. Frassetto (415.354.2700) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Peter L. Weber of the law offices of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (415.788.1900) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties, Debra Schoenberg and Schoenberg Family Law Group PC

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court sets aside the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS DEBRA SCHOENBERG and SCHOENBERG FAMILY LAW GROUP, P.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION and continued for ruling only on February 21, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Counsel may or may not appear. The Court will either post a ruling as part of the tentative rulings for that date and/or will read a statement into the record at the hearing of February 21, 2017.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)
